chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.180 of 2021 Muhammad Shahid Versus Sajid Ahmed Khan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 1857/21 Dated: 25.01.2024 None present. -.-.- Appellant’s counsel is not appearing in the matter for quite some time. He was called absent on 08.02.2022, 17.03.2022, 27.04.2022, 17.11.2023 and so also today. There is no intimation either. It is almost 12:00 noon. Instant High Court Appeal as such is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
